name: FBLF
pitch: Interactive Halftone Screen Dissolve. Converts the image into a raw black-and-white dot matrix print on warm cream paper. Hovering initiates a tactile diagonal wipe that sweeps across the canvas, dissolving the halftone grid into the original full-color photograph along an organic, contour-guided border with chromatic aberration.

lifecycle.idle: Detailed black-and-white halftone print on textured cream paper with a double-octave organic breathing scale and tilt
lifecycle.discovery: Cursor enters, triggering a sharp, chromatic diagonal wipe starting from the hover coordinate
lifecycle.buildUp: Diagonal wipe sweeps across the image, exposing the color photograph on one side of the sweep line
lifecycle.peak: Complete photograph visible behind the sweep line, blending cleanly into the print screen on the other side
lifecycle.recovery: Diagonal wipe retreats smoothly back to idle state
